bullets: Managed 30–50 daily inquiries, streamlining intake-to-release workflows for customer units.
Facilitates clear communication between management and staff by attending and documenting meetings and reporting key insights to the owner.
Maintains high service standards, consistently resulting in positive customer feedback.
Delivering high-quality graphic design solutions for a variety of print and digital projects, including brochures, magazines, and social media marketing assets using Adobe Photoshop and Canva.
Maintaining high standards of accuracy and visual appeal across all deliverables, ensuring projects are optimized for both print production and digital display.
Cultivating long-term relationships with repeat clients by consistently producing work that aligns with their specific brand guidelines and visual identity.
Reduced inventory discrepancies by performing daily audits to ensure match between digital records and physical stock.
Increased order fulfillment accuracy to 80% by implementing standardized tracking and quality control protocols.
Ensures smooth transactions from order processing to delivery, avoiding delay in order ship outs and bad customer experiences.
Increased store revenue by 50% through proactive sales and expert product demonstrations.
Engaging to 30–70 customers daily, providing personalized recommendations and resolving inquiries.
Optimizing store displays and operations to enhance product visibility and brand reputation.
Enhanced customer satisfaction with attentive service and quick resolution of complaints.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Information Technology
